creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bdrewery
Date: Wed May  1 23:19:46 2013
New Revision: 317064
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/317064

Log:
  - Move ruby-bsdconv to rubygem-bsdconv
  - Update to 10.0.0
  
  PR:		ports/178172
  Submitted by:	Kuan-Chung Chiu <buganini@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Added:
  head/converters/rubygem-bsdconv/
     - copied from r316805, head/converters/ruby-bsdconv/
Deleted:
  head/converters/ruby-bsdconv/
  head/converters/rubygem-bsdconv/pkg-plist
Modified:
  head/MOVED
  head/converters/Makefile
  head/converters/rubygem-bsdconv/Makefile
  head/converters/rubygem-bsdconv/distinfo

Modified: head/MOVED
==============================================================================
--- head/MOVED	Wed May  1 23:16:28 2013	(r317063)
+++ head/MOVED	Wed May  1 23:19:46 2013	(r317064)
@@ -4242,3 +4242,4 @@ net-mgmt/nettop||2013-04-30|Has expired:
 devel/ruby-term-ansicolor|devel/rubygem-term-ansicolor|2013-04-30|Moved to Rubygems
 www/mediawiki|www/mediawiki119|2013-05-01|Rename mediawiki to mediawiki119
 www/squid31||2013-05-01|Has expired: No longer actively maintained upstream
+converters/ruby-bsdconv|converters/rubygem-bsdconv|2013-05-01|Moved to Rubygems

Modified: head/converters/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/converters/Makefile	Wed May  1 23:16:28 2013	(r317063)
+++ head/converters/Makefile	Wed May  1 23:19:46 2013	(r317064)
@@ -143,9 +143,9 @@
     SUBDIR += py-zfec
     SUBDIR += rcctools
     SUBDIR += recode
-    SUBDIR += ruby-bsdconv
     SUBDIR += ruby-dump.rb
     SUBDIR += ruby-iconv
+    SUBDIR += rubygem-bsdconv
     SUBDIR += shftool
     SUBDIR += showkey
     SUBDIR += ta2as

Modified: head/converters/rubygem-bsdconv/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/converters/ruby-bsdconv/Makefile	Mon Apr 29 11:06:11 2013	(r316805)
+++ head/converters/rubygem-bsdconv/Makefile	Wed May  1 23:19:46 2013	(r317064)
@@ -2,10 +2,10 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	bsdconv
-PORTVERSION=	9.0
-CATEGORIES=	converters ruby
-PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${RUBY_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
-DISTNAME=	${GH_ACCOUNT}-${GH_PROJECT}-${PORTVERSION}-0-g${GH_COMMIT}
+PORTVERSION=	10.0.0
+CATEGORIES=	converters rubygems
+MASTER_SITES=	RG
+DISTNAME=	ruby-${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}
 
 MAINTAINER=	buganini@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Ruby wrapper for bsdconv
@@ -14,12 +14,12 @@ LICENSE=	BSD
 
 LIB_DEPENDS=	bsdconv:${PORTSDIR}/converters/bsdconv
 
-USE_RUBY=	yes
-USE_RUBY_EXTCONF=	yes
+CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--with-bsdconv-dir=${LOCALBASE}
+
+GEM_NAME=	${DISTNAME}
 
-USE_GITHUB=	yes
-GH_ACCOUNT=	buganini
-GH_PROJECT=	ruby-${PORTNAME}
-GH_COMMIT=	7bc3d11
+USE_RUBY=	yes
+USE_RUBYGEMS=	yes
+RUBYGEM_AUTOPLIST=	yes
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/converters/rubygem-bsdconv/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/converters/ruby-bsdconv/distinfo	Mon Apr 29 11:06:11 2013	(r316805)
+++ head/converters/rubygem-bsdconv/distinfo	Wed May  1 23:19:46 2013	(r317064)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (buganini-ruby-bsdconv-9.0-0-g7bc3d11.tar.gz) = 904f89f76e23dbbd8a9956f37242f1769ed528b70de226dc311f12cdfd081625
-SIZE (buganini-ruby-bsdconv-9.0-0-g7bc3d11.tar.gz) = 2802
+SHA256 (rubygem/ruby-bsdconv-10.0.0.gem) = 237ca317abdb7c3298244d8273b3ba32d9ac1d9805429408f205cc7e2c9c8631
+SIZE (rubygem/ruby-bsdconv-10.0.0.gem) = 9216
